description: Phrase-search the text_items of a parsed-document JSON and return matches with merged bounding boxes (stdlib reimplementation of liteparse.search_items).
rules: read-only — consumes a parsed JSON file (pages[].text_items[]) produced by the parse perk
matches may span multiple adjacent text_items; matched items are merged into one combined bbox
fully local, stdlib only — no liteparse package or network required
results written under record_store as matches.json
usage: Set PARSED_JSON (a JSON file with pages[].text_items[]), PHRASE, optional CASE_SENSITIVE (1). Output: matches.json (list of {page_num, text, x, y, width, height}).
limitation: Operates on already-parsed JSON; it does not parse documents itself. Use the parse perk (FORMAT=json) first to produce the input.
